GAMES.DESCRIPTION: Connect the sweepstakes platforms you operate. Bella will reference active games when customers ask, and route load/redeem actions through your stored API credentials.
GAMES.TIP_BANNER: Your API keys are encrypted and isolated to your workspace — Patra never sees other operators' data.

MODAL.TITLE: Configure {gameName}
MODAL.IP_WHITELIST_LABEL: I have added Patra's IP to my {gameName} whitelist
MODAL.IP_WHITELIST_HELP: Required for API connection. Find this in your {gameName} agent panel.
MODAL.DISPLAY_NAME_HELP: How Bella will refer to this game
MODAL.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to disconnect {gameName}? Your credentials will be deleted.
